refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted verification for terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-function by comparing generated terrain maps with ground truth, detecting known obstacles in test scenarios, and validating work-zone representation against site plans.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and terrain feature extraction.
DP3: Generate a digital worksite map integrating terrain and obstacle data with geospatial referencing.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The sensor fusion approach logically supports both terrain and obstacle analysis with manageable coupling through data interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data under varying environmental conditions.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting accuracy of terrain and obstacle detection.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data processing to isolate noise filtering and improve robustness.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping, integrating sensor data, processing, and map generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote Safety Services and Teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the mapping function is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not contain mapping logic; high diffusion risk if mapping logic placed here.
Teleoperation consumes map data but does not perform mapping; high diffusion risk.
Safety Services uses map data for alerts but does not perform mapping; very high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Mapping functionality is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if mapping logic is not well modularized internally.
Interface performance overhead between NGHE Solution and Vehicle for telemetry data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define internal submodules within NGHE Solution for sensor data processing and map generation to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor fusion) logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear verification paths and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution.
Interfaces are well-defined and limited to known interfaces.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution for mapping functionality, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing NGHE Solution outputs against ground truth and simulated inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping function to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Modularize NGHE Solution internally to handle sensor data processing and map generation separately.
Monitor interface performance between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to ensure telemetry data throughput.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership. No further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

revise.why: Internal modularization of NGHE Solution recommended to manage complexity and maintain containment.

assumptions: Interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking, Network Link) are stable and performant.
open_risks: Sensor data noise impacting mapping accuracy.
Potential performance bottlenecks at telemetry interface.
evidence_needed: Sensor data quality reports under operational conditions.
Performance metrics of telemetry interface during data transfer.
